education_required: Diploma in Mechanical / B.Tech/B.E in Mechanical
raw_text:
25. Die Design Engineer

Job Summary  
Specializes in designing dies for stamping, forming, and forging applications.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Design stamping and forming dies  
• Prepare strip layout and die assembly d rawings  
• Define clearances, tolerances, and material flow  
• Collaborate with die makers and production teams  
• Optimize die design for high -volume production  
• Support die trials and debugging  
Required Skills  
• Strong knowledge of sheet metal processes  
• Die de sign software (CATIA, NX, SolidWorks)  
• Understanding of press operations  
• Analytical and troubleshooting skills  
Qualification  
• Diploma / B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical  
Experience  
• 3–6 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹30,000 – ₹60,000 per month
